evaluation.overall_comment: This translation fails critically and is unusable in its current form. It contains severe structural defects that directly violate standard translation quality guidelines: mixed languages, extensive meta-commentary, and inline alternative translations are pasted throughout the dialogue. These artifacts indicate a draft, debugging output, or poorly processed machine translation rather than a final, professional localization. To be viable, the text must be cleaned of all English instructions, contradictory alternatives, and translator notes, retaining only a single, consistent Spanish rendering of each line. Once purified, the underlying terminology and conceptual explanations are acceptable, but as presented, it receives the lowest possible evaluation across all dimensions due to catastrophic formatting and structural contamination. Clean, unified Spanish is required to meet even basic quality thresholds (18-20 range for high quality, or at least 6-12 for acceptable major defects). As-is, it falls squarely into the critical error category (0-5 points). For a professional result, please extract only one consistent Spanish version per line and remove all drafting notes, English fragments, and alternative phrasing suggestions.
